hard.note: schema.rs has unified MambaConfig with discover(), entry_point(), is_symbol_exposed(), has_crate_expose(). ProjectConfig has entry_point field with Default derive. driver/config.rs duplicate struct removed. CLI updated to use entry_point() method.
Spec has no Test Plan section content (only TODO placeholder), so the hard reject rule does not apply.

41 config tests and 58 driver tests all pass. cargo check passes for both cclab-mamba and cclab-cli with zero errors. The SIGABRT at ~2300 tests is the known JIT crash (#1187), unrelated to this change.

soft.note: Clean consolidation with proper doc comments on all new methods.
discover() returns Option, entry_point() returns Option<&str>, both handle missing data gracefully.
No performance-sensitive changes; all operations are simple lookups.
All public methods have rustdoc comments with issue references.

summary: Implementation correctly unifies the dual MambaConfig structs. All config and driver tests pass. No regressions.
